recipe.title: Tuesday: Spaghetti and Meatballs
ingredients: Mixed greens with olive oil + red wine vinegar
steps: Bring large pot salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti per package.
In large skillet, heat olive oil. Add garlic, cook 1 min until fragrant.
Pour in marinara, add 1/4 cup water. Add frozen meatballs. Simmer covered 15–18 min, stirring occasionally.
Drain pasta, toss with sauce. Season to taste.
Serve with garlic bread and side salad.
